title: AOS Verifier Input
description: Canonical schema for verifier input artifacts, used to orchestrate UAT verification.

schemaVersion.description: The schema version of this artifact.

taskId.description: The identifier of the task being verified.

runId.description: The unique identifier for the execution run.

description.description: Detailed description of what is being verified.

checkType.description: The type of check to perform (e.g., file_exists, content_contains, test_passes, build_succeeds).

targetPath.description: Optional path or command argument for the check.

expectedContent.description: Optional expected content or outcome for the check.

isRequired.description: Whether this criterion is required for overall success.

path.description: Workspace-relative path to a file in scope.

scopeType.description: The type of scope (read, write, etc.).
